get.summary:
ListSpaces returns all spaces for the authenticated user
Required Permissions:
- read:spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

delete.summary:
DeleteSpace removes a space by ID
Required Permissions:
- delete:spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
ID of the space to delete (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

post.summary:
CreateSpace creates a new space with the specified configuration
Required Permissions:
- write:spaces

parameters.name: space.accountId
parameters.description:
Identifier of the account associated with the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

put.summary:
Updates a space in the account identified by the given ID.
Required Permissions:
- write:spaces

parameters.name: space.accountId
parameters.description:
Identifier of the account associated with the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: space.id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the space (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the space (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the space was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

name.title:
Name of the space.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and dashes

deletedAt.description:
Timestamp when the space was deleted (or is started to be deleting).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteSpace is called.

cloudProviderId.description:
Cloud provider where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the provider IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviders` method.
In this case, `hybrid` isn't supported.
After creation, this field cannot be changed.

cloudProviderRegionId.description:
Cloud provider region where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the region IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviderRegions` method.
After creation, this field cannot be changed.

state.description:
Status of the space
All fields inside `state` are read-only.

space.title: Space represents a vector search space in the Qdrant serverless environment

v1Space.title: Space represents a vector search space in the Qdrant serverless environment

url.title: URL to access the qdrant space (aka serverless database) without port

grpcPort.title:
The port to use for HTTP REST calls (6333)
TODO: We only support gRPC, so this isn't needed
int32 rest_port = 2 [(buf.validate.field).int32.gt = 0];
The port to use for gRPC calls (6334)

v1SpaceEndpoint.description:
Endpoint information to access the qdrant space (aka serverless database).
All fields in this message are a read-only field.

phase.description: The current operational status of the space.

reason.description:
Descriptive message explaining any errors or issues with the space.
Empty when the space is operating normally.

endpoint.description:
The URL endpoint where clients can connect to and interact with the space.
Not set if the space is not yet ready or is disabled.

v1SpaceState.description:
SpaceState represents the operational state of a space in the Qdrant serverless environment.
It provides status information, error details (if any), and endpoint access information.

v1SpaceStatePhase.description:
SpaceStatePhase defines the operational phases of a Qdrant space.

 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified phase.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_READY: The Space is fully operational and available for use.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_PROCESSING: The Space is being created, updated, or undergoing maintenance.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_DISABLED: The Space has been temporarily or permanently disabled.

v1UpdateSpaceResponse.title: UpdateSpaceResponse is the response from the UpdateSpace function
